display.purpose: The one large page title per screen (a company name, 'Sign in'). FK Grotesk 600.

headline.purpose: Section headers and the company name in the profile card.

title.purpose: Card titles, result-row headlines, dialog titles.

body-sm.purpose: The dense-UI default: table cells, input values, list metadata.

label.purpose: Form labels, button text, chip text, column headers.

caption.purpose: Timestamps, source domains, helper text. Ink Toned on the ground.

shadows.name: float
shadows.purpose: The single card/panel shadow for genuinely floating surfaces (homepage form, popovers). Warm-tinted with the deep newsprint hue.

shadows.name: lifted
shadows.purpose: A hovered or dragged floating element only. Deeper, same warm tint.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default ease-out (quint-like) for state transitions and SSE row entrances. No bounce.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Most state transitions (hover, focus, fill changes).

motion.name: duration-entrance
motion.purpose: SSE result-row fade/slide entrance. Has a prefers-reduced-motion crossfade alternative.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main action: homepage search submit, primary confirmations. Full-width on the search form.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { font-family: 'FK Grotesk', -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #fcfaf9; background: #3f3e3e; border: none; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 18px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #292a2a; } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #1d1e1e; transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #46bbff; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: #f3ece7; color: #8c8888; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Lower-priority actions: reset filters, view all searches.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { font-family: 'FK Grotesk', -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #292a2a; background: #fcfaf9; border: 1px solid #d8cbc0; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 18px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), border-color 150ms; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #f3ece7; border-color: #c0b2a6; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #46bbff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: The single company name/domain field on the homepage, and all form fields.
components.html: <label class="ds-input-label">Company name or domain</label><input class="ds-input" type="text" placeholder="acme.com" />
components.css: .ds-input-label { display: block; font-family: 'FK Grotesk', -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #292a2a; margin-bottom: 6px; } .ds-input { font-family: 'FK Grotesk', -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #292a2a; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #ebe0d8; border-radius: 8px; padding: 9px 12px; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; transition: border-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #8c8888; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #46bbff; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(70, 187, 255, 0.2); }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Content-type filter buttons. Icon + label; color is never the only signal. Selected variant included.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; font-family: 'FK Grotesk', -apple-system, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #5c5959; background: #fcfaf9; border: 1px solid #ebe0d8; border-radius: 999px; padding: 6px 14px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms, border-color 150ms, color 150ms; } .ds-chip:hover { background: #f7f3ef; } .ds-chip:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #46bbff; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-chip--selected { background: #292a2a; border-color: #292a2a; color: #fcfaf9; } .ds-chip-count { font-size: 0.8125rem; opacity: 0.7; } .ds-chip-ico { flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Company Profile Card
components.description: The static in-flow card at the top of a result page. Uses a border + tonal contrast, not a shadow.
components.html:
A

Acme Corporation

acme.com · Enterprise software

Disambiguated via BrandFetch. 248 results across the last 36 months, filtered to coverage about the company.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fcfaf9; border: 1px solid #ebe0d8; border-radius: 16px; padding: 32px; max-width: 640px; } .ds-card-head { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 16px; } .ds-card-logo { width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 8px; background: #292a2a; color: #fcfaf9; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'FK Grotesk', sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.25rem; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'FK Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 1.875rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.15; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: #292a2a; margin: 0; } .ds-card-sub { font-family: 'FK Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #5c5959; margin: 4px 0 0; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'FK Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.55; color: #292a2a; margin: 0; max-width: 70ch; }

components.name: Result Row
components.description: Signature component: the unit of the scored, SSE-streamed list. Flat row (never a card), content-type icon + headline + source + match score with confidence bar.
components.html: Acme acquires rival in $2B deal, reshaping the sectorreuters.com · 3 days ago · News94
components.css: .ds-result-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; padding: 14px 16px; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #ebe0d8; transition: background 150ms; } .ds-result-row:hover { background: #f7f3ef; } .ds-result-row:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #46bbff; outline-offset: -2px; } .ds-result-ico { flex-shrink: 0; width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 8px; background: #f3ece7; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; } .ds-result-main { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; min-width: 0; flex: 1; } .ds-result-title { font-family: 'FK Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.3; color: #292a2a; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-result-meta { font-family: 'FK Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; color: #5c5959; } .ds-result-score { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-end; gap: 4px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-result-score-num { font-family: 'FK Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: #292a2a; } .ds-result-bar { width: 56px; height: 3px; border-radius: 999px; background: #ebe0d8; overflow: hidden; } .ds-result-bar-fill { display: block; height: 100%; background: #292a2a; border-radius: 999px; }

narrative.overview: Breakbeat is a researcher's warm-papered desk where verified press clippings are laid out and sorted by signal. The metaphor is literal in the brand's own token names, inherited from Drumbeat: the warm paper ground is `newsprint`, the dark text is `screen` (printer's ink). The whole product is an act of filtering coverage about a company down to what matters, then arranging it for fast, trustworthy review. The system is light, warm, and editorial, anchored on Drumbeat's #efe8e3 newsprint ground with near-white #fcfaf9 cards floating under a single soft, warm-tinted shadow. Type is one confident grotesque (FK Grotesk) doing all the work through scale and weight. Color is held in reserve: ink and paper carry 90% of every screen, and the three brand brights appear only as content-type icon fills, semantic states, and the focus ring.
keyCharacteristics: Warm newsprint ground (#efe8e3), near-white floating cards, ink-on-paper contrast.
One grotesque type family (FK Grotesk); hierarchy through size and weight, never a second face.
Restrained color: ink + paper dominate; brand brights reserved for icons, states, and focus.
Trust made visible: source, match score, and classification accompany every result.
Calm under live load: SSE entrances reassure, never flash or thrash.

rules.name: The Ink-and-Paper Rule
rules.body: Ink and newsprint carry at least 90% of every screen. If a brand bright is filling more than icons, states, and the focus ring on a given view, it is overused. Their rarity is what makes them legible as signal.

rules.name: The Newsprint Contrast Rule
rules.body: Body-size secondary text on the #efe8e3 ground uses Ink Toned #5c5959 (5.7:1), never Ink Muted #6f6b6b (4.35:1, fails AA at body size). #6f6b6b is permitted only on the lighter #fcfaf9 surface, or at >=18px. Placeholders use #8c8888 on white inputs only.

rules.name: The Colored-Text Demotion Rule
rules.body: A brand hue carrying text drops to its darker step: error copy is #a02c38, not #fd9aa4; a colored link is #1071b3, not #46bbff. The bright 400s are fills and indicators only.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: FK Grotesk is the only typeface. No serif for editorial warmth, no mono for technical credibility. Warmth comes from the paper; credibility comes from the data.

rules.name: The Fixed-Scale Rule
rules.body: Sizes are fixed rem, never clamp(). A heading that fluidly shrinks inside a sidebar or dense list looks worse, not designed. The scale is fixed at ~1.2-1.25 between steps.

rules.name: The Warm-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows are tinted with the newsprint deep hue (#3d332b), never neutral or cool black. A cool gray drop-shadow on warm paper is the tell of an off-brand component.

rules.name: The Tonal-Before-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Reach for a tonal step (newsprint-raised, newsprint-sunken) or a border before reaching for a shadow. Shadows are for things that genuinely float above the page.

dos: Do anchor every screen on the Newsprint ground #efe8e3 with #fcfaf9 surfaces, the inherited Drumbeat brand, non-negotiable.
Do use Ink Toned #5c5959 for body-size secondary text on the ground; reserve #6f6b6b for the white surface or >=18px.
Do demote brand hues to their darker step for any colored text (#a02c38 error copy, #1071b3 links).
Do pair every content-type color with a distinct icon shape and a text label, so color-blind users are never disadvantaged.
Do carry all six interaction states on every control, with a visible Accent-Blue focus ring throughout.
Do announce SSE result arrivals via an ARIA live region, and give every entrance a prefers-reduced-motion alternative.
Do tint shadows with the deep newsprint hue #3d332b, and prefer tonal layering or a border before a shadow.
Do keep FK Grotesk as the only typeface; build hierarchy with the fixed rem scale and weight.
donts: Don't ship the generic AI-SaaS template: no gradient heroes, no purple-blue gradients, no tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows, no identical icon-card grids.
Don't build a heavy enterprise dashboard: no chart junk, no gray-on-gray density, breathing room is required.
Don't let clean tip into flat and lifeless: pure white, one gray, no warmth, no point of view is a failure.
Don't use a cool or neutral-black drop shadow on the warm paper; it reads instantly as off-brand.
Don't put a brand bright (#46bbff / #56e69a / #fd9aa4) on body text or let it fill more than icons, states, and the focus ring.
Don't wrap result rows in cards; the list is flat rows separated by hairlines.
Don't use clamp()/fluid headings, a second font family, or a display face in UI labels, buttons, or data.
Don't encode meaning in color alone; score, state, and content type each need a non-color signal.
Don't use border-left/border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe.
